changes.message: wire up OG card routes and COEP exemption
add OG image generation module
add Pillow dependency and OG card assets
only bump version on main branch
add knitephox, near, and firo to admin easter egg names
EmuLinker easter eggs — admin welcome + MOTD console log
swap Konami Code for HELLO protocol trigger, enhance CRT effect
Konami Code easter egg — HELLOD00D protocol tribute
vertical alignment of version badge in lobby footer
auto-versioning with changelog display
prevent permanent freeze when a peer stops advancing in lockstep
support multiple CORS origins via comma-separated ALLOWED_ORIGIN
emulator hibernate — WASM module stays alive between games
mode switching: lockstep ↔ streaming without page reload
guest black screen after streaming → lockstep
EJS menus appearing during gameplay after hibernate/wake
C-level resync via WASM exports for fast in-core state hashing and transfer
GGPO-inspired frame pacing — frame advantage cap prevents faster machine from outrunning slower peer
two-stage input stall recovery with resend protocol
sync diagnostics — log ring buffer, per-frame event log, exportable CSV
admin page for sync log management
iOS audio routing workaround and mobile touch guard
virtual gamepad alignment — D-pad centered, diagonal A/B layout
frame cap threshold: use >= instead of > to trigger at boundary
delta base buffer detached by Web Worker transfer
late-join pull model — joiner requests state when emulator is ready
room auto-closes when host leaves mid-game
frozen frame ghosting on game end
late-joiner lastUsersData race condition
WebRTC offer-before-listener race on late-join
4-player mesh networking (up to 6 bidirectional WebRTC connections)
spectator support via host canvas MediaStream
audio bypass — AudioWorklet with fallback for non-secure contexts
C-level deterministic timing via forked mupen64plus-next core
late-join infrastructure — host sends compressed save state
desync detection with deferred hash checks
free-running input sync — both emulators at 60fps independently
configurable DELAY_FRAMES input buffer
Emscripten pauseMainLoop/resumeMainLoop for frame stepping
initial lockstep prototype using rAF interception
streaming mode — host streams canvas video via WebRTC MediaStream
